DP.238.0000:
The flowers that grow in the fields
here are special.\f
Do you see how they’re more vivid
than flowers elsewhere in Sinnoh?\f
You can thank Pokémon for that.
DP.238.0001:
If you put Honey on a tree, check
back later to see if it’s rustling.\f
If it is, it’s quite often a rare
Pokémon.\f
It gets my hopes up if I see that
happening.
